title: Portable Grass
description: A mod that lets you port grass blocks shades between biomes.
body:
After some work on Furenikus Roads Port, I present to you the Portable Grass Mod! This mod, as described, lets you bring grass blocks from other biomes to whichever biome you are in. This mod makes ugly grass shades a thing of the past! Now, even if you're in an ocean, a swamp, or a desert, you can still experience the luscious green shades of jungles, plains and forests. 

This mod has all 22 variants of grass that naturally spawn throughout the biomes in the game, and can be crafted using the Google Docs crafting guides, with JEI compatibility added in release 1.1.

 

https://docs.google.com/document/d/1FNVt2DsTz0BmNLeaZmg8Ih-yya6qTnGSICp1XdZpkSs/edit?usp=sharing

 

Join the Discord To Report Any Bugs, Give Feedback or Suggest Mods/Features
https://discord.gg/Ahdt84uAtt
